hero.body_1: EqualHome is the first app that makes the mental load of your household visible, so you can truly share it. Not just chores:

stats.label: of household mental tasks carried by one person, usually the woman.
of housework and 83% of planning carried by mothers.
imbalance persists in LGBTQ+ couples (vs 80/20 hetero).
phases ignored by task apps: anticipate, decide, monitor, execute.

mental.subtitle: Task apps only measure execution. EqualHome also recognises the three invisible phases that weigh the most.

phases.title: Anticipate
phases.desc: Thinking about the birthday gift three weeks ahead. Tracking shoe sizes.

phases.title: Decide
phases.desc: Choosing the insurance, the paediatrician, the school. Comparing, deciding, taking responsibility.

phases.title: Monitor
phases.desc: Checking the fridge is full, the bill is paid, the vaccines are up to date.

phases.title: Execute
phases.desc: Cooking, driving, filing. The only phase other apps see.

steps.title: Create your household
steps.desc: Your names, your language, a colour each. That's it.

steps.title: Log in 1 tap
steps.desc: Execution tasks + mental load. One toggle is enough to tell them apart.

steps.title: See the balance
steps.desc: A living Balance Score, updated in real time. Readable at a glance.

balance.body: The Balance Score combines your execution tasks and mental load into an honest reading. No ranking, no moral score. Just reality, so you can talk about it differently.

items.q: We stopped arguing about groceries, and started talking about who was even thinking of buying them. EqualHome put a word to it.
items.name: Léa & Marc

items.q: I was afraid it would turn our home into a spreadsheet. Instead: we talk less about chores, more about balance.
items.name: Inès & Théo

items.q: My husband didn't realise. The Sunday evening AI insights have become our honest ritual.
items.name: Sophie & David

pricing.trial: A 7-day trial with no commitment. You keep access to your history even if you switch back to free.

cta.body: The app is coming soon. Join the waitlist and be among the first to try EqualHome.

faq.contact: Another question? Write to us at

items.q: What if my partner refuses to sign up?
items.a: You can use EqualHome solo: you track your own load, see your imbalances, and share a visual report. The app remains useful, and the invite remains possible at any time.

items.q: Will the AI judge who does more?
items.a: No. The tone is descriptive, never accusatory. The insights explain and suggest. They don't score anyone. EqualHome makes things visible, never guilty.
Your data is encrypted and never sold. You can export or delete your household at any time from Settings.

items.q: How does EqualHome distinguish mental load from execution?
items.a: Each task can be logged with a 'I also managed the mental load' toggle. This adds 1 to 3 bonus points depending on the weight set by your couple. The weight is fully customisable.
French and English at launch. German, Spanish, Italian, Dutch and Portuguese coming within 6 months.

footer.tagline: EqualHome makes the mental load of your household visible, so you can truly share it.
footer.made: MADE IN FRANCE · FOR THE WORLD

cookie_banner.text: We use anonymised analytics cookies to improve the site.
